source_name: Retail pump price - diesel multi-state average
notes: Multi-state diesel average weighted by station count. QLD: 1015 stations, avg 185.2 c/L, source date 2026-06-30; WA: 677 stations, avg 218.7 c/L, source date 2026-07-20. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting; WA FuelWatch.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data diesel latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices June 2026
